positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of bioluminescent stars and celestial constellations. The aesthetic should be neo-art deco meets ethereal vaporwave, utilizing deep indigo and vibrant cyan gradients contrasted with sharp, metallic silver accents. Composition should feature a central, balanced arrangement, designed as a clean, repeatable silhouette suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. The moonlight should emit subtle, glowing rays that contrast sharply with the void-like background. Ultra-detailed linework, volumetric lighting, high contrast, vector art quality, symmetrical composition.
